result.text: Scan: a truck towing a boat named {pick:'Knot Working'|'Ship Happens'|'Vitamin Sea'|'Unsinkable II'}. The boat is, note, nowhere near water. Analyze the pun, or chart their water probability?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

pun.text: Pun analysis: groan factor {n:6-10} out of 10, commitment factor maximum. The name 'Unsinkable II' implies an Unsinkable I. Investigate the implication?

invest.text: Records suggest Unsinkable I is... unavailable for comment. The sequel carries the family hopes. We wish it calmer waters and better luck.

float.text: Agreed — some names are gravestones and prayers at once. The pun endures. The boat rides on, dry and optimistic.

water.text: Probability of water contact today: {n:40-95} percent. There is a lake {n:8-40} miles ahead. The boat can smell it. Boats can smell lakes, Captain. Trust sensors.
